diagrams.title: Design Thinking Five Stages
diagrams.description: Circular iterative process showing five stages: Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test with arrows connecting them in a cycle
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the non-linear, iterative nature of Design Thinking process

diagrams.title: Double Diamond Model
diagrams.description: Two diamond shapes representing divergent and convergent thinking: First diamond (Discover → Define), Second diamond (Develop → Deliver)
elements: Define phase (narrow end of first diamond)
Develop phase (wide start of second diamond)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing exploration and delivery phases in design projects

diagrams.title: Empathy Map Template
diagrams.description: Four-quadrant grid for capturing user insights: Says, Thinks, Does, Feels
diagrams.purpose: Tool for organizing user research and building empathy

diagrams.title: User Journey Map
diagrams.description: Horizontal timeline showing user experience with emotional peaks and valleys across touchpoints
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing complete user experience to identify improvement areas

diagrams.title: Design Sprint Five-Day Schedule
diagrams.description: Calendar view showing five-day compressed Design Thinking process
